@startuml
actor Actor
participant "AuthController" as AuthController
database JwtTokenProvider
entity JwtAuthenticationResponse

Actor ->> AuthController : authenticateUser()
activate AuthController
    AuthController->JwtTokenProvider: generateToken(user)
    activate JwtTokenProvider
        return token
    deactivate JwtTokenProvider
    
    create object of JwtAuthenticationResponse #white 
    note right on link\nnew instance created endnote 
    
return responseDto  
deactivate  authcontroller  

@enduml
